docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ASHLEY CARNEGIE FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. VISITING JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ELEMER U CORTINA IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,439.80 FILED BY CORTINA, ELEMER U AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
